race.comment: HARD AS BROK (2) got the maiden win under the belt here before being tipped out for further time to furnish. Tuned up for this with a recent trial and hails from a very astute barn. Should be right there at the business end. The well-related MISS FLEETWOOD (12) (half to G3 winner and G2 placed Rise Of The Masses) boasts a win over this distance range and has been well in the betting in all three runs this preparation. Watch for sharp improvement. BOLSHEVIC ROAD (1) resumes here but showed enough when last in work to warrant consideration in a race of this calibre. Shapes as a leading player. Former Victorian CHERRABAH (8) is having her first run for the new stable and any market confidence must be noted. MARATHIA (6) next best with the claim.
